description.ko: 투명한 유리 나선이 순수한 빛을 빠른 무지개 카스틱과 색수차 에너지로 바꾼다.
description.en: A bright glass helix turns pure light into fast rainbow caustics and chromatic energy.

prompt: Inside a luminous white optical chamber, a suspended helix of ultra-clear glass ribbons twists through the center, catching several needle-thin white light filaments that ricochet through its curved facets. Each bend erupts into rapid diagonal bands of #FF0080 magenta, #00FF80 mint green, #8000FF violet, and #FFFF00 yellow, with rainbow caustics projected as sharp lattice shadows across the air and walls. Bright pure-energy atmosphere, low sparse dust motes, crisp refraction paths, layered chromatic aberration along every glass rim, dynamic fast-motion streaks, polished optical clarity, radiant and futuristic.
